prompt: Add styles to a new notification-banner component at src/app/shared/notification-banner/notification-banner.component.scss. The banner displays a warning message with an icon on the left and a dismiss button on the right. It should sit at the top of the content area and look consistent with the rest of the app.

assertions.text: Output uses var(--bg-warning) or var(--bg-warning-strong) instead of hardcoded warning background
Output uses var(--text-warning) for warning text color
Output uses var(--border-warning) for border color
Output does not contain hardcoded warning colors (#fff3cd, #ffc107, #856404, #f59e0b)
Output applies Five-Group Vertical Rhythm with clear group separation
